commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a gateway-side fresh `system.execApprovals.get` check and tests so `exec.approvals.node.set` rejects missing or stale node approval base hashes before forwarding writes.

PR surface: Source +79, Tests +183. Total +262 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main forwards `exec.approvals.node.set` directly to the node set command without a gateway-side fresh read, and the branch tests the stale, missing, and matching base-hash flows. I did not run a live gateway/node repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair job is needed because there are no actionable line-level findings; the draft maintainer PR needs normal maintainer review and broader validation before landing.

target.title: fix(gateway): guard node approval policy writes
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a gateway-side fresh read before `exec.approvals.node.set` forwards node approval policy writes.
- Reject missing/stale `baseHash` values against the current node snapshot so stale UI/CLI state cannot overwrite newer node approval rules.
- Add focused gateway handler coverage for stale, missing, and matching node approval hash flows.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.ts src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean

## Notes
- `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 node scripts/check-changed.mjs` could not complete locally because the delegated Blacksmith Testbox sync failed before running checks: `runner@... Permission denied (publickey)`, then the wrapper stopped `tbx_01kt07jtg21c4pv2vp5rxm47ph`.
- Changelog entry intentionally omitted; autoreview confirmed the root changelog is release-owned for normal fixes.
target.author: vincentkoc
